title: Overflow feels good in my body
subtitle: A two-part energy statement for releasing the bracing response to abundance and allowing overflow to feel safe and good.
excerpt: A short energy statement from Day 42 of the MONEY program. Two moves: release the body's habit of bracing when money is good, then allow overflow to feel calm, natural, and safe.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 42 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Allow overflow to feel normal."

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 42 of the MONEY program. Two moves: release the bracing pattern, then allow the body to receive overflow as safe.
I release the habit of bracing when money is good. I release the nervous scan for what will take it away. I let go of the belief that overflow is temporary or unsafe.
I allow overflow to feel good in my body. I allow calm when money is plentiful. Overflow is safe and I let it stay.
Read the release statement slowly, then pause. Read the allow statement and let the words land.
Adapted from Day 42 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
